content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
bithe giyangname wajifi jai aibe kiqembi
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

I will attempt to translate the given Manchu sentence to English. Manchu is a Tungusic language, and while it is not commonly spoken today, it has a rich history and was the language of the Qing dynasty in China.

The sentence provided is: "bithe giyangname wajifi jai aibe kiqembi"

Translating this requires understanding the grammatical structure and vocabulary of Manchu, which can be quite complex. Here is my attempt at translation based on the knowledge of Manchu language:

### I am reading this book carefully ###
